def positive_integration_test_writes_state_without_cleanup():
    rule_id = "integration_test_writes_state_without_cleanup"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Integration test creates database rows or files without a teardown or transactional rollback."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
